rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SALLY S.L. LAM
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/28/21 . (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: The "supplement" filed on 5/17/21 amended the petition. No notice of the "supplement" was given. There was no Exhibit D to the petition (purportedly the estate bank statement for the period ending 9/11/2020). Also, the bank account number in Exhibit C was fully redacted, so that the ending numbers of that account are unavailable to the Court. Exhibit B is not proof that the Fidelity account was transferred to Terry Ann Lam; it merely shows who the primary beneficiaries were and not what was paid out or transferred to anyone. The table on page 3 of the petition is not exactly what was alleged in the ex parte petition filed on 3/18/2020, which showed specific assets of the Estate, not in the name of Terry Ann Lam, as of 11/12/2019. (The time for filing creditor claims expired on 12/22/2017, not 11/27/2017. Prob. C. Sect. 9202(b) also requires notice if an HEIR is or has previously been confined in a prison or facility under the jurisdiction of the Department of Corrections, etc.) Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 9/17/21 . Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDWARD VINCENT ESTRADA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Prior to a full review of the petition, the following issue will need to be addressed at hearing: Petitioner alleges that there are 37 successors in interest to John M. Estrada's estate. Three of the successors in interest themselves postdeceased John M. Estrada (leaving a total of 8 of their own successors in interest). Additionally, ten of the successors in interest are missing, and Petitioner requests that those interests be deposited with the County Treasurer pursuant to PC 11850(a). Probate Code 13100 allows the "successor of the decedent" to execute affidavits pursuant to 13101. PC 13006 defines "successor of the decedent" as "the sole person or all of the persons who succeeded to the particular item of property" under 6401 and 6402. Here, some members of the "successor of the decedent" are deceased or are missing and therefore cannot sign the 13101 affidavits. In addition, the successors of the successors in interest are not authorized to execute the 13101 affidavits. Petitioner also requests that the interests of those who are missing be deposited with the County Treasurer; however, those interests have not been properly validated (the missing persons have not executed 13101 affidavits). Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 10th amended general order.
